exercises.sentence: Hoy yo _______ mucha hambre, así que voy a comer una pizza.
exercises.translation: Today I am very hungry, so I am going to eat a pizza.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ dos hermanos mayores que viven en Madrid.
exercises.translation: I have two older brothers who live in Madrid.

exercises.sentence: Cada mañana, yo _______ que estudiar para mi examen de español.
exercises.translation: Every morning, I have to study for my Spanish exam.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ tiempo para ir al cine conmigo esta noche?
exercises.translation: Do you have time to go to the cinema with me tonight?

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué _______ tanta prisa para salir de casa?
exercises.translation: Why are you in such a hurry to leave the house?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ un perro muy inteligente y cariñoso.
exercises.translation: You have a very intelligent and affectionate dog.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ veinte años y estudia medicina en la universidad.
exercises.translation: She is twenty years old and studies medicine at the university.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ mucha suerte porque ganó un viaje a México.
exercises.translation: He is very lucky because he won a trip to Mexico.

exercises.sentence: Mi hermana _______ una casa pequeña pero muy bonita.
exercises.translation: My sister has a small but very pretty house.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo _______ un problema con mi computadora y no pude trabajar.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I had a problem with my computer and I could not work.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que caminar mucho ayer porque mi coche no funcionaba.
exercises.translation: I had to walk a lot yesterday because my car was not working.

exercises.sentence: El año pasado yo _______ una experiencia inolvidable en Perú.
exercises.translation: Last year I had an unforgettable experience in Peru.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué _______ que hacer ayer por la tarde?
exercises.translation: What did you have to do yesterday afternoon?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ mucha paciencia con el niño ayer durante la clase.
exercises.translation: You had a lot of patience with the child yesterday during class.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ noticias de tu familia la semana pasada?
exercises.translation: Did you have news from your family last week?

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ que cancelar la cita porque estaba enferma.
exercises.translation: She had to cancel the appointment because she was sick.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ un regalo increíble para su cumpleaños ayer.
exercises.translation: He had an incredible gift for his birthday yesterday.

exercises.sentence: La reunión _______ éxito gracias a todo el equipo.
exercises.translation: The meeting was successful thanks to the whole team.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo _______ un gato negro que se llamaba Bigotes.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I had a black cat named Bigotes.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo siempre _______ mucho sueño por las mañanas.
exercises.translation: Before, I was always very sleepy in the mornings.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ miedo de la oscuridad cuando era pequeño.
exercises.translation: I was afraid of the dark when I was little.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ muchos amigos en la escuela primaria?
exercises.translation: Did you have many friends in primary school?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ una bicicleta roja cuando vivías en el campo.
exercises.translation: You had a red bicycle when you lived in the countryside.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué _______ en la mano cuando te vi ayer?
exercises.translation: What did you have in your hand when I saw you yesterday?

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ el pelo muy largo cuando estudiaba en la universidad.
exercises.translation: She had very long hair when she was studying at university.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ una casa cerca de la playa hace diez años.
exercises.translation: He had a house near the beach ten years ago.

exercises.sentence: Mi abuelo _______ mucha energía aunque era bastante mayor.
exercises.translation: My grandfather had a lot of energy even though he was quite old.
